title: Founder OS HQ - Briefings
description: Consolidated briefings database merging P02 Daily Briefings, P05 Weekly Reviews, P19 Slack Digests, and P22 Morning Sync briefings. Each record has a Type column.

Date.description: Primary date for idempotent upsert (combined with Type)

Meeting Count.description: Number of meetings in the period

Email Count.description: Number of emails in the period

Sources Used.description: Data sources used for this briefing

Week Ending.description: P05: Week ending date for weekly reviews

Carryover Items.description: P05: Tasks carried to next week

Next Week Priorities.description: P05: Recommended priorities for next week

notes: Idempotent upsert uses Date + Type as compound key (e.g., one Daily Briefing per day, one Weekly Review per Week Ending date). P05 Weekly Review uses Week Ending as its date key. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Briefings' first, then fall back to plugin-specific names.
